examples: He is making the unarguable point that our desires and preferences have a social component.
Nevertheless, this tooth is the first unarguable proof that crocodilians did indeed snack on dinosaurs.
It is an unarguable fact that the teaching of composition in Chinese plays an extremely role in the middle school.
These are all well known and unarguable (the extent to which it happens is arguable, the basic fact not).
At this juncture, one point seems unarguable: The military is the most cohesive and unified political force in Russia today.
